title: Desert Ruins
description: Adds many different ruins to the desert
body:
**This mod adds many different ruins to the desert**
![Big ruin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6794b0030066c3bff74618873375c7d54125832.jpeg)

- Some ruins contain secret chests hidden within
- The ruins also feature suspicious sand

 ![Ruin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f34a5386929a1fe638dde14f76735d23a1f15ce.jpeg)

- There are 13 unique ruins featured in the mod

![Ruin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e12f8273e727480fc9c3b29f553e78df0c453fc.jpeg)

![Ruin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03eb3c42b13cb890c0cad0e0194776b6d1c913b1.jpeg)

- The Ruins will only spawn in desert biomes
  
Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
